---
toc: FALSE

listing:
  - id: futur-bourses
    contents: bourses/new
    type: default
    image-height: 1.5in
    sort:
      - "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    table-striped: true
    
  - id: past-bourses
    contents: bourses/past
    type: grid
    sort:
      - "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title]
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    table-striped: true
    
---

# Concours de bourses ouverts


</br>


::: {#futur-bourses}
:::
